title: senecio barbatus
intro: Senecio barbatus, also known as the mountain arnica or woolly candelabra, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Senecio barbatus include its ability to reduce swelling, ease pain, and promote wound healing, making it a popular remedy for sprains, strains, and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Senecio barbatus include tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
